{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192318FCF749DA99D4D682D3A5"}"},"total":18},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7466445590232007449","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很棒的一篇女尊文，作者的称呼设定的很有意思，也不像一些女尊文只是披了层皮的女尊，喜欢作者说的那句女性所拥有的生育权是掌握在自己手里的，毕竟这是女性天生的能力，应该尊重，而不是想着把这能力给男性，不然也只是写男硬称呼女的虚假女尊，从文里称呼细节方面可以看出，作者写文很用心，女主真的很强大，也真的很宠自己的世子卿，文很甜，但也不光是甜，男女主知道男主身世后的挣扎也写的很好，本来开始很怕这是个虐点，但幸好没有。
文虽然不是没有缺点，但对于我来说，这本已经很完美了，期待作者开的新文！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738420246,"group_id":"7399575638090206232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读者，双标各种控远离我，脾气不是很好，请勿对本人发表不正言论","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/osUrzmO7mB6oIBRLL4Rz4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f9355f2afef648808ed57a6e0b03e43b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710612&x-signature=NeaEIcZHyY9MC9qZoQR1%2FfFAkng%3D","user_id":"110544138725","user_name":"纤纤细羽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110544138725","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741139593,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399575638090206232","book_info":{"abstract":"【女尊、大女主、心狠手辣恶女】
【纨绔乖张女主VS九窍玲珑心男主】
一张圣旨将长安城内最有名的纨绔世子嬴黎川与长安双郎之一的谢家五郎绑在了一起
京中众人皆摇头叹息：谢家五郎那般星月见之都要羞而遮云端之人嫁给那纨绔世子，这辈子算是毁了啊！
谁料，两人成亲后，嬴世子一改往日纨绔形象
青楼不逛了，赌场不去了，花酒不喝了，点卯上朝了，认真工作了
更甚至有人说曾在那胭脂水粉首饰铺见到嬴世子陪着世子卿购置物品。
能陪自家夫人去胭脂水粉首饰铺的女子在长安可谓少之又少，一时之间，求嫁为世子俾侍之人络绎不绝。
起初，嬴世子一本正经地说：免了，家有悍夫，岂敢岂敢？
后来，她说：他居后位，朕方安心
——
避雷：女本位，子嗣、儿子指女，皇子、世子一系列继承人均为女性，女生子（生育权是上天赋予女性独有的特权！）权谋方面不好请多见谅！！
一句话的概括：迎娶高富帅，走上人生巅峰","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7fca2b7d1b3f31020f70177e5648e390~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨痕无言","author_id":"","book_id":"7399575638090206232","book_name":"长安第一纨绔","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8b8a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":877,"name":"古色古香","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=877&name=古色古香&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":861,"name":"宠夫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=861&name=宠夫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7399576077389021720","read_count":"189","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"464492"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"202","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,古色古香,女强,HE,宠夫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7fca2b7d1b3f31020f70177e5648e390~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362599&x-signature=AXiNIuuhY5003zEF0i2JZnikzUY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"5229811321","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192318FCF749DA99D4D682D3A5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20552,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1206},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1738430202,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7452904946902549273","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看！！！
首先，感觉书中的每一个人物都是真实存在过的，每个人的情感真实，特别能够打动读者[赞]
其次。个人很喜欢这种设定，女尊女生子。而且在文中的一些称呼虽然刚开始有点杂乱，但习惯了之后就会与平常的女尊文区分的很清楚，感觉这些称呼更尊重女性。
再说回小说本身情节，感动于黎川和姜且、温允禾的友情，羡慕蓁蓁与他安君的爱情，理解黎川对桃桃和呦呦姐弟间的爱护。同时，作者在文中对穿越者的情况的描述感觉更符合现实。花舒即使贵为王卿，暴露了自身才能后也不免被统治者觊觎；姚绥在女尊男卑的世界里的不适应与隐忍，最终甚至差点迷失自我。
最后，感谢作者大大即使付出与回报不成比例，也依旧坚持写完了全文[敬礼]再期待一下大大的下一本书[舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735272064,"group_id":"7399575638090206232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5JU1bJQcXZpKj6J71ZBS1Kw4SRAJcfMLMA2VDwyPU8p","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/192914ff73a444b68f7cc4555ba3271d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705808&x-signature=i3PcZ8B7NEECzIn7W8MQCuYcnkU%3D","user_id":"1626900163988871","user_name":"湖心小岛的张大山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1626900163988871","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399575638090206232","book_info":{"abstract":"【女尊、大女主、心狠手辣恶女】
【纨绔乖张女主VS九窍玲珑心男主】
一张圣旨将长安城内最有名的纨绔世子嬴黎川与长安双郎之一的谢家五郎绑在了一起
京中众人皆摇头叹息：谢家五郎那般星月见之都要羞而遮云端之人嫁给那纨绔世子，这辈子算是毁了啊！
谁料，两人成亲后，嬴世子一改往日纨绔形象
青楼不逛了，赌场不去了，花酒不喝了，点卯上朝了，认真工作了
更甚至有人说曾在那胭脂水粉首饰铺见到嬴世子陪着世子卿购置物品。
能陪自家夫人去胭脂水粉首饰铺的女子在长安可谓少之又少，一时之间，求嫁为世子俾侍之人络绎不绝。
起初，嬴世子一本正经地说：免了，家有悍夫，岂敢岂敢？
后来，她说：他居后位，朕方安心
——
避雷：女本位，子嗣、儿子指女，皇子、世子一系列继承人均为女性，女生子（生育权是上天赋予女性独有的特权！）权谋方面不好请多见谅！！

nt":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":48291,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":1280},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1735346354,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7546754508497109822","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的写的很好看，也是难得还能看得进去的一本书。[雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]
       虽然书中的称呼有一些调转，让人一时对应不起来，但不可否认这本书真的非常值得大力推荐！！！！[大笑][大笑][大笑]
        在古代篇，主角还是因为皇权不得不与他的好友们分开，喜欢在草原上骑马的主角最终还是被困在了长安40年，镇北王卿花舒他的经历，这里面有太多太多让人感觉非常郁闷，却又不得不接受的事情，我那个时候看着看着真的感觉好憋屈呀，我就感觉一股子气发不出来。现代篇是写的比较欢快。
       这本书写的挺好看的，真的很推荐！！！！[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":177,"s":174,"text":"镇北王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%95%87%E5%8C%97%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774178599D682D3A5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227546754508497109822%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227399575638090206232%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%95%87%E5%8C%97%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757119229,"group_id":"7399575638090206232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我攒下所有小幸福","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N86dS3eLRUh2D+EmRQ4xHzuRRVSQfO9kXbBn68Ferj1J","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/71eda766001c45b792ccd71aa303a582~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702051&x-signature=2eNuGUgHBhdRJdIWMMVSJFsMe0g%3D","user_id":"1627706204371187","user_name":"我的未来光明璀璨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1627706204371187","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399575638090206232","book_info":{"abstract":"【女尊、大女主、心狠手辣恶女】

更甚至有人说曾在那胭脂水粉首饰铺见到嬴世子陪着世子卿购置物品。
